torch_pattern: shifted = x - torch.max(x, dim=dim, keepdim=True)[0]; exp = torch.exp(shifted); out = exp / torch.sum(exp, dim=dim, keepdim=True)
applicability_notes: ttnn.max as the numeric-stabilization head of a decomposed softmax chain (max -> sub -> exp -> sum -> add(eps) -> reciprocal -> mul). Used only when the fused ttnn.softmax is not applicable (row length >= 4096); below that threshold the entire chain fuses to ttnn.softmax(x, dim=dim, numeric_stable=True).

placement_observations.source: call_site safe_softmax: decomposed max/exp/sum/reciprocal path selected for large rows; tensors default interleaved

placement_observations.size_descriptor: reduced row [.., 1] (keepdim=True), broadcast back in subtraction
placement_observations.source: call_site safe_softmax: max_vals = ttnn.max(x, dim=dim, keepdim=True) consumed immediately by x - max_vals
